name: bio-workflow
description: Codex plugin wrapper for qgzeng's SLURM bioinformatics workflow skill.

interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin wrapper around the bio-workflow skill for qgzeng's /data9 SLURM server. It is not a generic bioinformatics toolkit; adapt paths, QOS, protected directories, and cluster policy before using it elsewhere.
defaultPrompt: Use bio-workflow to resume and validate a SLURM workflow.
Use bio-workflow to review this sbatch script before submission.
Use bio-workflow to onboard a bioinformatics tool safely.
